questionHtml:
What is the difference between a conjugate Brønsted–Lowry acid–base pair?

A.  Electron pair

B.  Positive charge

C.  Proton

D.  Hydrogen atom

meta.title: What is the difference between a conjugate Brønsted–Lowry acid–base pair? A. Electron pair B. Positive charge C. Proton D. Hydrogen atom
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?
Reactivity 3.1.1—Brønsted–Lowry acid is a proton donor and a Brønsted–Lowry base is a proton acceptor. Deduce the Br.nsted–Lowry acid and base in a reaction.
